steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content: From the graph the boundary has slope $3$ and y-intercept $7$, so the line is $y=3x+7$.

steps.title: Determine the inequality direction
steps.content:
The shaded region lies above the boundary (and the line is dashed, so the inequality is strict), giving $y\gt 3x+7$.

That confirms A is correct.
